## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an [x] -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test additions or improvements

## Pre-submission Checklist
<!-- All items must be checked before submitting -->
- [ ] **Tests pass:** All existing and new tests pass (`cargo test`)
- [ ] **Clippy clean:** No warnings or errors (`cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`)
- [ ] **Docs updated:** Documentation reflects the changes (README, inline docs, examples)
- [ ] **No breaking changes without migration:** If this is a breaking change, a migration path is documented
- [ ] **New tests added:** New functionality has corresponding tests
- [ ] **Adversarial tests considered:** Edge cases, malformed input, and error conditions are tested

## Breaking Changes
<!-- If this PR introduces breaking changes, list them here with migration instructions -->
- None

- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing performed
